snippet: Limited online training, together with system support is available for SCAS by contacting the Conveyance Allowance Unit on 1800 060 970 (select option 1) or at conveyance@education.vic.gov.au . For some step-by-step SCAS training exercises, refer to the accessible version of the e-learning course External Link . Responsibilities of parents/carers Guidance chapter on the roles and responsibilities of parent... Conveyance allowance rates Guidance chapter setting out the annual conveyance allowance... Guidance chapter on the SCAS training and support available to school staff Reviewed 16 January 2026
